versions.prompt: Build an Inbox-style page: shell with header, main content. In main, a list of 5 message rows (title + preview text, clickable). When a row is clicked, open a side drawer on the right showing message subject, sender, date, and body text with a "Close" button. Use the Shidoka drawer and list components with proper layout and padding.
versions.code:
import { html } from 'lit'; import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/web-components'; import '../../components/global/uiShell/index'; import '../../components/global/header/index'; import '../../components/global/footer/index'; import '../../components/reusable/sideDrawer/index'; import '../../components/reusable/button/index'; import '../../components/reusable/card/index'; import '../../components/reusable/pagetitle/index'; import '../../components/reusable/link/index'; const meta: Meta = { title: 'Generated/Primary Button v3', id: 'primary-button-v3-ef46b461', tags: ['autodocs'], parameters: { layout: 'fullscreen' }, decorators: [ (story) => html`
${typeof story === 'function' ? story() : story}
`, ], }; export default meta; type Story = StoryObj; export const Inbox: Story = { render: () => html`
Open Message

Project Update

From: Alice (Design) Today, 10:30 AM

Hi team, just wanted to share the latest updates on the design system components. We have finalized the button states and the new table wrapper structure. Please review the attached documentation.

Reply Archive Close

`)}
© ${new Date().getFullYear()} Shidoka `, };
